abort.no_devices_found: No Bluetooth devices found. Make sure the device is powered on, in range, and not connected to the phone app.

init.title: Status display & panel
init.description: Pick the entities to rotate on the matrix. Override panel size / color type / framing generation if auto-detection is wrong (0 = auto).

data.mtu: MTU override (0 = auto; small MTU = slow transfers)

send_raw.name: Send raw frame
send_raw.description: Write raw bytes to the device for protocol experimentation.

display_text.name: Display text
display_text.description: Rasterize text and send it to the panel as pixels (experimental, unverified on hardware).

display_image.name: Display image
display_image.description: Load an image (path or URL), fit it to the panel, and send it as pixels (experimental).

source.name: Source
source.description: Local file path or http(s) URL.

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: How to fit the image to the panel.

display_gif.name: Display GIF
display_gif.description: Load a GIF (path or URL) and send it. Raw on gif-capable panels, else decoded to pixels (experimental).

source.name: Source
source.description: Local file path or http(s) URL.

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: How to fit decoded frames (ignored for raw GIF).
